commands.show running-config:
V5424G# show running-config

hostname V5424G

time-zone GMT+9

ntp 203.254.163.74

bridge vlan create 2

vlan add default 1-20,25-36 untagged
vlan add br2 21-24 untagged

interface default
no shutdown
ip address 1.1.1.1/24

interface br2
no shutdown
ip address 2.1.1.1/24
